'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 63''' was the sixty-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 12]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
*[[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]]
*[[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]
*[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] - [[Petranaki arena|Execution Arena]]
*[[GV/3-series guardian droid|GV/3 Guardian]]
*[[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell's]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends#Equipment|Weapons]]
*[[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|Republic Attack Gunship]]
*[[V-35 Courier/Legends|V-35 Landspeeder]]
